certifications.name: AI DevOps Professional Training Program
certifications.sponsor: Bihar Skill Development Mission (Government of Bihar)
certifications.description: Completed a rigorous 90-day hands-on AI DevOps Professional Training Program with practical labs and project-based learning. Covered the full DevOps lifecycle from Linux fundamentals to container orchestration, CI/CD automation, and cloud infrastructure deployment.

certifications.name: Docker Fundamentals
certifications.description: Completed practical Docker training with hands-on containerization projects covering Dockerfile authoring, multi-container apps with Docker Compose, and container networking.

certifications.name: Python for Data Science & Machine Learning
certifications.description: Completed comprehensive Python ML course with practical projects covering data manipulation, machine learning algorithms, and data visualization.

certifications.name: LangChain & LLM Application Development
certifications.description: Built real RAG applications using LangChain, FAISS, ChromaDB, and Mistral AI. Implemented end-to-end retrieval-augmented generation pipelines for intelligent document Q&A.

certifications.name: AWS Cloud Practitioner
certifications.description: Actively preparing for the AWS Cloud Practitioner certification. Strong hands-on foundation in AWS services through project deployments.

certifications.name: Kubernetes Fundamentals
certifications.description: Learning Kubernetes for container orchestration at scale. Covered during the 90-day AI DevOps Training and continuing with advanced self-study.

summary: Suryanandan has completed a 90-day AI DevOps Professional Training at Orbiqe Technologies (Bihar Skill Development Mission), Docker Fundamentals, Python ML, and LangChain/RAG development training. He is actively pursuing AWS Cloud Practitioner and Kubernetes certifications in 2025.
